taskTemplates.title: Restock {productName}
taskTemplates.defaultInstructions: Move {quantity} units from backroom to shelf location. Verify product rotation (FIFO). Check expiration dates. Update shelf tags if needed.

taskTemplates.title: Verify {productName} Display
taskTemplates.defaultInstructions: Verify display is properly arranged. Check signage accuracy. Ensure promotional materials are visible. Count units if required.

taskTemplates.title: Adjust {productName} Planogram
taskTemplates.defaultInstructions: Modify facing count as recommended. Ensure proper shelf allocation. Update position for optimal visibility. Maintain category integrity.

taskTemplates.title: Setup Substitute for {productName}
taskTemplates.defaultInstructions: Position substitute product prominently. Create substitution signage. Place substitution notification. Update promotional materials if needed.
